summary: Iteration 17 - CMS Page Builder and Block Rendering Tests. Verified P0 fix (Events block now uses start_date correctly) and P1 fix (Contact form without sidebar). All 12 backend tests and 11 frontend E2E tests passed.

cms_tiles_api.tile_by_slug_contact: PASS - /api/cms-tiles/Contact-us returns tile with contact_form block
cms_tiles_api.tile_by_slug_events: PASS - /api/cms-tiles/events-page returns tile with events block

events_api.upcoming_events: PASS - /api/events/upcoming returns upcoming events with start_date
events_api.event_date_format: PASS - Events use start_date field (not start_time) in ISO format

block_types.contact_form_block: PASS - Has correct structure with title and buttonText
block_types.events_block: PASS - Has correct structure with limit and layout

cms_pages.dynamic_navigation: PASS - CMS pages appear in navigation

events_block.date_format: PASS - Events show correct date format (Sun, Mar 15, 02:00 PM)
events_block.event_display: PASS - Events display title and date correctly

contact_form.no_sidebar: PASS - Contact form renders without sidebar (clean design)
contact_form.required_fields: PASS - Has all required fields (name, email, message)
contact_form.form_submission: PASS - Form submission works and shows success message

block_rendering.text_block: PASS - Text block renders HTML content

seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_ used for contact form submission tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: CMS Page Builder features verified: 1) Events block uses start_date correctly (P0 fixed), 2) Contact form renders without sidebar (P1 fixed), 3) CMS pages served at root URLs work correctly, 4) Dynamic navigation with CMS tiles works. All block types that have renderers work correctly. The Visual Block Editor admin panel was not tested (requires admin login) - focus was on public-facing CMS pages.
features_confirmed_working: Events Block - start_date field renders correct date format
Contact Form Block - clean design without sidebar
Dynamic Navigation - CMS tiles appear in nav
Contact Form Submission - API accepts and processes submissions
Block Rendering - heading, text, events, contact_form blocks render correctly
